goal: FR-30 — 監視 council（done-gate 検証 council）
eval_cmd: bash -n bin/flywheel && bash -n hooks/loop-driver.sh && bash -n hooks/lib/common.sh && ./bin/validate-plan all && grep -q 'monitor-set' bin/flywheel && grep -q 'watch-focus' bin/flywheel && grep -q 'watch_focus' hooks/lib/common.sh && grep -q 'monitor' hooks/loop-driver.sh && FW="$PWD/bin/flywheel"; T="$(mktemp -d)"; ( cd "$T" && "$FW" start "eval-probe" --eval "true" >/dev/null 2>&1 && "$FW" watch-focus "pf" >/dev/null && "$FW" monitor-set clean >/dev/null && "$FW" get '.watch_focus' | grep -qx pf && "$FW" monitor-set drift design "r" >/dev/null && "$FW" get '.monitor.level' | grep -qx design ) && test -f skills/monitor/SKILL.md && test -f agents/drift-observer.md

history.by: loop-driver: monitor drift (impl) → 差し戻し
loop-driver: monitor drift (impl) → 差し戻し

loop-driver: eval pass (bash -n bin/flywheel && bash -n hooks/loop-driver.sh && bash -n hooks/lib/common.sh && ./bin/validate-plan all && grep -q 'monitor-set' bin/flywheel && grep -q 'watch-focus' bin/flywheel && grep -q 'watch_focus' hooks/lib/common.sh && grep -q 'monitor' hooks/loop-driver.sh && FW="$PWD/bin/flywheel"; T="$(mktemp -d)"; ( cd "$T" && "$FW" start "eval-probe" --eval "true" >/dev/null 2>&1 && "$FW" watch-focus "pf" >/dev/null && "$FW" monitor-set clean >/dev/null && "$FW" get '.watch_focus' | grep -qx pf && "$FW" monitor-set drift design "r" >/dev/null && "$FW" get '.monitor.level' | grep -qx design ) && test -f skills/monitor/SKILL.md && test -f agents/drift-observer.md) + monitor clean
